docket_entries.description: PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY DEFENDANT GUERRERO, MARINA
DECLARATION OF RUSSELL DAVIS IN REPLY TO OPPOS TO DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF AURORA LOAN SERVICES, LLC ITS ASSIGNEES AND /OR SUCESSORS

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MARINA GUERRERO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO LIMIT THE COMPLAINT TO TRUSTORS ON THE DEED OF TRUST. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GRACE MORALES WONG'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS TO ANSWER. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL IS TO READ AND COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
